mapper.select: SELECT t.terms_no, t.app_type_cd, t.terms_type_cd, t.required_yn, t.version, t.content, t.created_at, t.created_by FROM terms t WHERE t.terms_no = #{termsNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO terms (app_type_cd, terms_type_cd, required_yn, version, content, use_yn, created_by) VALUES (#{appTypeCd}, #{termsTypeCd}, #{requiredYn}, #{version}, #{content}, 'Y', #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE terms SET app_type_cd = #{appTypeCd}, terms_type_cd = #{termsTypeCd}, required_yn = #{requiredYn}, version = #{version}, content = #{content}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE terms_no = #{termsNo}
UPDATE terms SET use_yn = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE terms_no = #{termsNo}
